Home.title: Schedule field visits without losing operational control.
Home.description: A simple page for clients to request appointments while supervisors confirm times, assign technicians, and keep the agenda organized.

booking.title: Bookings without accounts
booking.description: Clients request a visit from mobile and share the details needed to prepare the job.

approval.title: Supervisor confirmation
approval.description: Every request stays pending until the team reviews availability, duration, and technicians.

mobile.title: Field-ready agenda
mobile.description: Supervisors and technicians can work from a view designed for daily mobile use.

request.title: The client requests
request.description: They choose a service, date, 30-minute time slot, and share address, equipment, and problem details.

review.title: The supervisor reviews
review.description: They validate the request, adjust duration, and assign one or more available technicians.

visit.title: The visit is scheduled
visit.description: The client receives a secure link and the team sees the confirmed job in the agenda.

final.title: Ready to start with real booking requests.
final.description: First, a clear public experience. Next, booking, approval, and internal scheduling flows can connect on this foundation.

DailyAgenda.description: Review the appointment requests and confirmed visits for the selected period.
DailyAgenda.emptyDescription: Use the previous and next links to review another date or period.

PendingRequests.title: Pending requests
PendingRequests.description: Review appointment requests awaiting supervisor approval.
PendingRequests.emptyDescription: New client booking requests will appear here until a supervisor confirms them.

AppointmentDetail.whatsappMessage: Hi {clientName}, we are contacting you about your {serviceName} appointment with Service Scheduler.
AppointmentDetail.confirmRequiresSupervisor: Only supervisors and admins can confirm appointments.
AppointmentDetail.assignRequiresSupervisor: Only supervisors and admins can assign technicians.
AppointmentDetail.allTechniciansAssigned: All technicians are assigned to this appointment.
AppointmentDetail.schedulingConflict: One or more technicians are already assigned to another confirmed appointment during this time.

Book.title: Tell us what you need fixed.
Book.description: Share your contact details and equipment information. A supervisor will review the request before confirming the time.

serviceType.label: Service type
serviceType.description: Choose the option that best describes the visit you need.

repair.label: Repair
repair.description: For equipment that is not working correctly.

maintenance.label: Maintenance
maintenance.description: For cleaning, preventive checks, or tune-ups.

quotationInspection.label: Quotation/inspection
quotationInspection.description: For evaluating the work before confirming it.

emergencyService.label: Emergency visit
emergencyService.description: For urgent problems that need quick review.

timeSelection.label: Date and time
timeSelection.description: Choose a date and available time inside working hours.
timeSelection.noSlots: Choose a Monday to Saturday date to see available times.
timeSelection.helperText: The selected time stays pending until a supervisor confirms the visit.

problemDescription.label: Problem description
problemDescription.placeholder: The unit is not cooling and makes noise when it starts.

clientNotes.label: Additional comments
clientNotes.placeholder: Contact preferences, access notes, or other helpful details.

Book.reviewNotice: Send the request when your details are ready. A supervisor will review it before confirming the visit.
Book.ctaNote: Final confirmation stays pending until a supervisor reviews the request.

confirmation.title: Your request is pending approval.
confirmation.description: A supervisor will review the service, selected time, and submitted details before confirming the visit.

AppointmentRequestEmail.subject: We received your appointment request
AppointmentRequestEmail.intro: Your request was received and is pending supervisor approval.
AppointmentRequestEmail.footer: We will contact you after reviewing your request.

AppointmentConfirmationEmail.subject: Your appointment is confirmed
AppointmentConfirmationEmail.footer: If you saved your appointment link from the first email, you can use it to view the updated details.
